name: Hisabi Transaction Register
query: SELECT name AS "Transaction:Link/Hisabi Transaction:180", wallet_id AS "Wallet:Link/Hisabi Wallet:170", transaction_type AS "Type:Data:110", date_time AS "Date Time:Datetime:160", account AS "Account:Link/Hisabi Account:160", category AS "Category:Link/Hisabi Category:160", amount AS "Amount:Currency:120", currency AS "Currency:Data:90", note AS "Note:Data:240", doc_version AS "Version:Int:80", server_modified AS "Server Modified:Datetime:160" FROM `tabHisabi Transaction` WHERE is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY date_time DESC, modified DESC LIMIT 500
